demo_steps.narration: Welcome to the AI Crew organisation dashboard. This is where you can view and manage your team of AI agents.
The dashboard shows all available crew members with their specializations and current status.
Let's start by clicking on Hermes, our communication specialist agent.
A detailed profile modal appears showing Hermes' capabilities and performance metrics.
Now let's close this modal and check out another crew member.
Next, we'll view Darwin, our data analysis expert.
Darwin specializes in pattern recognition and predictive analytics.
Finally, let's meet Lili, our creative content generation specialist.
Lili can generate various types of creative content including text, images, and multimedia.
Let's scroll back up to see the full crew overview.
And now we'll return to the main dashboard to complete our tour.
